segments.text: thank you for the promise of your faith.
thank you for all your praise, even if you promise me a way out of your gainless game.
my father was a young man.
our heads have hit the pavement.
he's choked his face to soothe him.
may have i loved and chose to sing.
all that i can feel within.
and no one even told me.
the way that you should feel.
tell me that you lose your son.
tell me that you lose your love.
the things that i can't do to you.
the things that i can't do to you.
may have i loved and chose to sing.
or i choose to sing on my skin.
all that i can feel within.
we heard it all for you.
we heard it all for you.
we heard it all for you.
